seo.title: XB Pilates - Bodyweight Workout Program
seo.description: Tone up without bulking up with XB Pilates. Develop the functional strength, body control, and body awareness in the comfort of your home with trainer Andrea Rogers.

trainers.bioBodi: As a Pilates instructor and former professional dancer, Andrea Rogers created Xtend Barre, XB Pilates, and XB Sweat + Sculpt by combining elements of barre and Pilates with high-energy cardio-dance. Her proven programs and techniques have helped thousands of people worldwide transform their bodies and gain strength and confidence.

data.descriptionShort: Get a Pilates body in 21 days!
data.descriptionLong: XB Pilates pairs traditional mat moves with reformer-inspired cardio sequences to sculpt your abs, tighten your booty, and build strength from head to toe.

modules.equipment: Mat, Strength Slides*, Resistance Loops*, Dumbbells (Light)*
modules.categories: Pilates, Barre, Low Impact, Slim & Sculpt, Weight Loss

modules.title: Is XB Pilates Right For Me?
modules.content: XB Pilates is for anyone looking to tighten and sculpt their bodies without enduring high-intensity, high-impact workouts. You can do XB Pilates in the comfort of your home, so you don’t have to take crowded, intimidating Pilates classes to reach your goals. XB Pilates is for all fitness levels, so if you’re advanced follow Andrea and if you’re just starting out follow the modifier.

modules.title: What Are The Workouts Like?
modules.content: Andrea presents Pilates in a fun, modern way and combines cardio, targeted abs and booty exercises, total-body strength and mobility work so you have everything you need to develop a tight, lean body. Andrea keeps things moving and her nonstop energy is infectious. It feels like you’re working out with her one-on-one so you want to come back day after day.

modules.title: Tools + Equipment
modules.content: Andrea and the rest of the cast frequently use light dumbbells, resistance loops and strength slides, but there is always one person on-screen showing you how to do the moves with no equipment, so the choice is entirely up to you.

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: Beachbody’s nutrition programs have made it easier for millions of people to eat healthier and make simple lifestyle changes that are easy to stick with. Created by Autumn Calabrese, Portion Fix shows you how eating the right portions helps you reach your goals—no counting calories or eliminating your favorite foods required. With 2B Mindset, creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, helps you lose weight happily by focusing on what you can eat, instead of what you can’t. You’ll never feel hungry or deprived. Need help choosing the right nutrition program for you? To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com.

trainers.bio: As a Pilates instructor and former professional dancer, Andrea Rogers created Xtend Barre, XB Pilates, and XB Sweat + Sculpt by combining elements of barre and Pilates with high-energy cardio-dance. Her proven programs and techniques have helped thousands of people worldwide transform their bodies and gain strength and confidence.

modules.title: Kacie O. lost 24 pounds doing XB Pilates.
modules.testimonial: I knew that I could do anything for just 30 minutes, so there was no excuse to not just hit play!
modules.disclaimer: Results vary based on starting point and effort. Results achieved in 3.5 months with XB Pilates.

NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A7tYnEi.description: Define yourself with PiYo. No weights, no jumps, just hardcore results.
NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A7tYnEi.descriptionShort: Define yourself with PiYo. No weights, no jumps, just hardcore results.
NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A7tYnEi.descriptionLong: PiYo combines the muscle-sculpting, core-firming benefits of Pilates with the strength and flexibility benefits of yoga. It's a true fat-burning, low-impact program that'll get you incredibly defined.
